notes: Monthly forward estimate file. Because 2026 is in the second half review window, Y1/Y2/Y3 map to 2027/2028/2029. Use public consensus/model pages when available; if public 2029E is unavailable, use clearly labeled model-derived estimates from sub-agent research. Valuation must judge current price from both future P/E and future P/S.

items.note: MarketScreener public table shows 2028E revenue about $382.1M and net income about $149.5M. 2029E is sub-agent model-derived: revenue +30% to about $497M and net margin around 37%, reflecting InP/AI optical substrate ramp after the 2028 jump. Treat as scenario estimate, not hard consensus.

finanzen/FactSet public table shows 2028E revenue about SEK675.45M and net income about SEK80.3M. 2029E is sub-agent model-derived from the Redeye/FactSet ramp: revenue SEK777M and net income about SEK80-85M, converted near 9.26 SEK/USD. Current market cap versus Y3 profit/revenue is the key Meme-risk test.

Zacks SCR explicitly values POET on 2029 revenue of $450M. 2029E profit is not directly provided, so sub-agent model derives about $68M at roughly 15% net margin after scale-up. StockAnalysis/Finnhub public forecast supports 2027E revenue around $81.6M and EPS still near breakeven/loss. High uncertainty.

MarketScreener public table shows 2027E revenue about $1.002B and net income about $137.5M. 2028/2029 are sub-agent model-derived using advanced packaging/laser anneal demand: roughly +15% then +12% revenue growth, with 2029 net margin around 15.5%.

finanzen/FactSet public table shows 2028E revenue about $4.1668B and net income about $1.457B. 2029E is sub-agent model-derived at about $5.2B revenue and $1.56B net income, using a lower normalized margin than 2028E to avoid overfitting the ramp. VCP's direct 2029 model is much more bearish and remains a low-confidence cross-check.

finanzen/FactSet public table gives direct 2029E revenue about $242.628B and net income about $152.65B, with 2027/2028 figures also public. This supports viewing current price through future P/E and P/S rather than treating MU as automatically expensive. Keep a cyclical-memory warning because VCP's proprietary 2029 model is far lower.

ValueInvesting public page shows 2029E revenue/EPS path; sub-agent derives net income around $65M from EPS and about 130.6M shares. X-FAB's own capital markets update points to a 2030 revenue outlook near $1.5B, so the 2029E public forecast is conservative rather than blue-sky.

Sub-agent research found public 2028E revenue/net income around $808.6M/$316.2M. 2029E is model-derived at +15% revenue growth and about 38% net margin, reflecting HBM/advanced packaging inspection demand while allowing growth to slow after the 2027-2028 ramp.
